==Japanese==

===Alternative forms===

* {{ja-l|虜}}, {{ja-l|俘}}, {{ja-l|囚}}, {{ja-l|俘虜}}

===Kanji===

====Readings====
{{ja-readings
|goon=ごん<ごん<ごむ
|kanon=きん<きん<きむ
|kun=とら-える<とら-へる, とりこ-
}}

===Etymology===
Originally a compound of {{compound|ja|sort=とりこ|取り|tr1=tori|t1=taking, capturing|pos1=the {{m|ja|連用形|tr=ren'yōkei||continuative or stem form}} of verb {{m|ja|取る|tr=toru}}, “to [[take]], to [[capture]]”|子|tr2=ko|t2=[[child]]; [[small]] thing}}.<ref name="KDJ">{{R:Kokugo Dai Jiten}}</ref><ref name="DJR"/>

===Pronunciation===
{{ja-pron|とりこ|acc=3|acc_ref=DJR|acc2=0|acc2_ref=DJR}}

===Noun===
{{ja-noun|とりこ}}

# a [[prisoner]], [[captive]], [[slave]]

====Usage notes====
Also used [[metaphor]]ically, such as {{m|ja|恋}}{{m|ja|の}}{{m|ja|擒|tr=koi no toriko|lit=[[love]]'s slave}}.
